verify_results.name: motivating_load_fadd_form
verify_results.body:
define i1 @motivating_load_fadd_form(ptr %p) {
entry:
  %a.ptr = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %p, i64 48
  %a = load double, ptr %a.ptr, align 8
  %b.ptr = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %p, i64 24
  %b = load double, ptr %b.ptr, align 8
  %x = fadd double %a, %b
  %c = fcmp ord double %x, 0.000000e+00
  %s = select i1 %c, double %x, double 0.000000e+00
  %r = fcmp oeq double %s, 1.000000e+00
  ret i1 %r
}

  %s = select i1 %c, double %x, double 0.000000
  %r = fcmp oeq double %s, inf
  ret i1 %r
}
